title: kettle
description: light, performant modpack with sane defaults
body:
![kettle banner image](https://wsrv.nl/?url=files.catbox.moe/qxa6bw.png)

---

### yet another performant modpack with QOL additions

---

### what?
**high performance modpack with many QOL features that don't take away from the vanilla feel**

**pre-configured to be coherent and familiar, with advanced features for the adventurous**

---

### how?
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium), [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium), and a lot of other mods that work under the hood to compliment each other
- tweaks to the vanilla game that don't feel out of place, like borderless fullscreen, fancier chat, and falling leaves to name a few
- built on [Fabric](https://fabricmc.net/), a modular, stable modding interface
- immersive experiences with [Presence Footsteps](https://modrinth.com/mod/presence-footsteps), [Visuality](https://modrinth.com/mod/visuality), along with some spatial audio modifiers

**this modpack does not add any content, and should maintain compatibility with vanilla servers**

---

### why?
the pursuit of a "vanilla" minecraft experience that was more interesting to play, the idea that minecraft could be more exciting than it currently is, in many ways

it is also my personal modpack, and will be as updated and maintained as possible, without sacrificing stability

---

### disclaimer
- this is not an official minecraft product, and is not affiliated with mojang or microsoft
- this modpack aims to be compliant with third-party server rules, but it is the responsibility of the user to verify this individually
